info.description: A single event or webcast card.

dateTime.description: Date and time text, e.g. '07/15/2026, 12:00 PM'.

ctaLabel.description: Button text, e.g. 'Sign Up to Watch Live' or 'Watch the Recording'.

image.description: Event image (optional; a branded colour block is used if empty).

brandLabel.description: If no image: main text on the branded colour block (optional).

brandSublabel.description: If no image: smaller text under the brand label (optional).
